_comment: Add LCD/hex pairs as you capture them. Each "hex" must be a 10-byte frame as logged by [micrometer][frame-complete]. Decoder activates with 2+ pairs and only if it can reproduce every pair exactly. To add a pair, run the app, watch the Electron terminal for [micrometer][frame-complete] hex= ..., and paste the line below with the LCD reading at that exact moment.
